race.comment: MOSQUITO AWARD (6) picked up in good style and wasn't beaten far at Werribee first-up. She's presented off a win at the Geelong jumpouts and won her Maiden prior. Has a low gate and is sure to enjoy the longer sprint. FORTYFOUR MAGNUM (11) went a bit quick in front over this distance at Seymour and was gobbled up late beaten 3.4L. Ran a nice race at Echuca three back and has won a Bendigo jumpout since last seen. Well-placed with a 3kg claimer engaged today and ridden a little more judiciously, she can be right in it. WESTERN LANE (5) has impressed all three starts since the switch from a Sydney stable and comes back in grade off the latest. Maps for a soft run and a senior hoop goes on. He also has each-way claims. COBBLESTONE WAY (2) resumes and has prepared with three placed jumpouts. He has had five first-up outings without a win, but John Allen's booking suggests she may present more forward this time around.
